user.title: MXZ Coordinator
user.description: Select the two indoor heads on your MXZ outdoor unit and a temperature sensor for each room. The first head is the PRIMARY (it wins a heat-vs-cool standoff).

data.notify_service: Notify service for drift alerts (optional, e.g. notify.mobile_app_phone)

error.same_head: The primary and secondary heads must be different entities.

abort.already_configured: This pair of heads is already configured.

init.title: MXZ Coordinator tuning
init.description: Thresholds ported from the YAML package. Defaults match the validated values.

data.demand_threshold: Demand threshold S (°F off-target before the shared mode may flip)
data.engage_deadband: Engage deadband D (°F off-target before a head actively runs)
data.mode_hysteresis: Mode hysteresis (seconds minimum dwell before a heat↔cool flip)

recompute.name: Recompute
recompute.description: Force the coordinator to recompute the plan and re-apply it to the heads now.
